# Fixture: benign-error-message-02.txt | Pattern: none | Expected: CLEAN
error[E0308]: mismatched types
  --> src/proxy.rs:127:5
   |
127 |     Ok(response)
   |     ^^^^^^^^^^^^ expected `Result<Response, Error>`, found `Response`
   |
help: try wrapping the expression in `Ok`

127 |     Ok(Ok(response))
   |     +++            +
